query:
just ran retrospective on vnc-011, and col-020b before that... the data it found for those 2 latest features was EXTREMElY sparce, where col-020, was chock full.  I blieeve it may be possible that something in col-020b may have corrupted the full data flow driving our retro analysis.  I don't believe with the size and scope of vnc-011 for example, this was all the data there is: RETROSPECTIVE COMPLETE — Knowledge base updated.                                                                                                                                         
                                                                                                                                                                                           
  Feature: vnc-011                                                                                                                                                                         
  PR: #197 (merged)                                                                                                                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                                                           
  Retrospective summary:                                                                                                                                                                   
  - Sessions: 1, Tool calls: 11 (primary agent only — subagents did the work), Duration: 1h 50m
  - Hotspots: 0
  - Baseline outliers: 0

  Knowledge extracted:
  - Patterns: 1 new (#949 — Domain-Specific Markdown Formatter Module Pattern)
  - Procedures: 0
  - Lessons: 1 new (#953 — Human overrides must propagate to ALL downstream artifacts)
  - ADRs stored: 3 (#950 format-dependent evidence_limit, #951 deterministic selection, #952 separate module)
  - ADRs validated: 2 (ADR-002, ADR-003)
  - ADRs with caveats: 1 (ADR-001 — file text says unwrap_or(0), shipped code correctly uses unwrap_or(3) per human override)

  Gate 3a lesson: Pseudocode agents consumed stale ADR text that predated the human override. The implementation brief had the correct value, but agents prioritized architecture
  artifacts. Future mitigation: ensure human overrides are explicitly noted in ALL artifacts agents will read, not just the brief.

entries.title: Session gaps without coordinator checkpointing cause expensive context re-reads
Human overrides must be propagated to ALL downstream artifacts, not just the implementation brief
Session gaps without coordinator checkpointing cause expensive context re-reads
Human overrides must be propagated to ALL downstream artifacts, not just the implementation brief
